name: obsidian
label: Obsidian Vault
description: Obsidian vault synced from a client device via Syncthing

auth.setup_guide:
Choose the client's Obsidian vault directory, add it as a Syncthing folder, and share it with this server using the Device ID shown in Infrastructure.

When the pending folder appears in this admin panel, accept it with local path: raw_sources/obsidian_vault/
